rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NICHOLAS GEORGE VIDAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1)Petitioner alleges that rental income and real property expenses were not received by Petitioner, but received and paid by Richard F. Ragan, as the nominated personal representative of the estate of Anthony Vidak, the sole beneficiary of this estate, who was only recently appointed executor on 2/6/18. 2) A waiver of accounting was filed by Richard Ragan, but prior to his appointment as personal representative. The hearing was continued twice for a new waiver to be signed, but no additional filing has been made. 3) Filing fees for this petition have not been paid.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOROTHY EILEEN GRIFFIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/1/18. An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends [California Rules of Court 7.53(a)]. The amended petition filed on 3/23/18 will be reviewed once notice and publication are filed. Both the notice and publication should specify that an AMENDED petition has been filed.
